name: Champagne Thanksgiving
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a basic bread dressing using 2-3 loaves of light bread, 2-3 cans of fat-free Oriental broth, sage, garlic, curry powder, cayenne pepper, lots of onions, and a bag of coleslaw vegetable mix.
2. Add hot water as needed and any other seasonings you would like.
3. Place the dressing in a roasting pan.
4. Mix 10 oz package of thawed (frozen) chopped broccoli with 2/3 cup fat-free blue cheese or Roquefort salad dressing, into which 1 oz of nonfat creamed cheese has been blended.
5. Remove the stems from large button mushrooms and fill each mushroom with the broccoli mix.
6. Bake the mushrooms on top of the turkeyless dressing at 375 degrees for about one hour.
7. Serve with a tossed salad, peas with baby potatoes, and all the Champagne you can drink.
